user.title: Joyonway Spa Connection
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your USR-W610 RS485/WiFi bridge.

error.timeout: Connection timeout — the W610 is not reachable at this IP. Check: 1) IP address is correct, 2) W610 is powered on, 3) W610 is on the same network/VLAN.
error.port_closed: Host is reachable but the TCP port is closed. Check: 1) the port number matches the W610 config (default: 8899), 2) no other application is already connected to it.
error.cannot_connect: Network error connecting to the W610. Check: IP address, firewall rules, and that the W610 is on the same network/VLAN.
error.unknown_data: TCP connection OK, data received but not recognized as Joyonway protocol. Check: 1) this is a Joyonway/Mesda spa, 2) W610 baud rate = 9600 8N1, 3) RS485 A/B wiring. Enable debug logs for raw data.
error.no_data: TCP connection OK but 0 bytes received (3s). Check: 1) RS485 wiring (A/B not swapped), 2) W610 mode = Transparent / TCP Server, 3) baud rate = 9600, 4) spa is powered on.

init.title: Spa Programmes
init.description: Manage custom programmes for your spa.

error.name_exists: A programme with this name already exists.

abort.no_programmes: No programmes to edit or delete. Add one first.
